aiReadyLines.text: English For Today 29
Look at some health problems. Choose several pieces of good advice
for each problem. There are more pieces of advice than problems.
Problems Advice
a, take some vitamin C
put some ointment on it
a c. drink lots of liquid
take enough rest
aheadache e, put a heating pad on it
f. put it under cold water
the g. take some paracetamol
h. gurgle with warm and salt water
i, see a dentist
j. see a doctor
Try to give more than one piece of advice for each problem. Follow the
What should you do for a cough?
You should gurgle with warm water.
It's a good idea to take some vitamin C.
Yes. And if it continues for long, you should see a doctor.
Well, I think it's good to avoid cold drink or ice-cream.
Sometimes it helps to ......

rawText:
English For Today 29
B. Look at some health problems. Choose several pieces of good advice
for each problem. There are more pieces of advice than problems.
Problems Advice
I. a, take some vitamin C
2. b. put some ointment on it
3. a c. drink lots of liquid
4. d. take enough rest
5. aheadache e, put a heating pad on it
6. f. put it under cold water
7. the g. take some paracetamol
h. gurgle with warm and salt water
i, see a dentist
j. see a doctor
Work in groups. Talk about the problems in section B and give advice.
Try to give more than one piece of advice for each problem. Follow the
model shown.
What should you do for a cough?
You should gurgle with warm water.
It's a good idea to take some vitamin C.
Yes. And if it continues for long, you should see a doctor.
Well, I think it's good to avoid cold drink or ice-cream.
Sometimes it helps to ......
